mapper.select: SELECT BUYER_CD ,APP_DOC_NUM ,APP_DOC_CNT ,DOC_TYPE ,GETCOMCODE(GATE_CD, 'M038', DOC_TYPE, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS DOC_TYPE_NM ,IMPORTANCE_STATUS ,GETCOMCODE(GATE_CD, 'M053', IMPORTANCE_STATUS, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS IMPORTANCE_STATUS_NM ,(REG_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD' ' hh24:mi') AS REG_DATE ,(MOD_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD' ' hh24:mi') AS MOD_DATE ,GETUSERNAME(GATE_CD, REG_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS REG_USER_NM ,GETCOMCODE(GATE_CD, 'M038', DOC_TYPE, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS DOC_TITLE ,SUBJECT ,CONTENTS_TEXT_NUM ,ATT_FILE_NUM ,SIGN_STATUS ,REG_USER_ID FROM STOCSCTM WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND APP_DOC_NUM = #{APP_DOC_NUM} AND APP_DOC_CNT = #{APP_DOC_CNT} AND DEL_FLAG = '0'

SELECT SIGN_PATH_SQ ,(CASE WHEN SIGN_REQ_TYPE = 'CC' THEN '-' ELSE SIGN_STATUS END) AS SIGN_STATUS ,SIGN_REQ_TYPE ,GETUSERNAME(#{ses.gateCd}, SIGN_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS SIGN_USER_NM ,(SIGN_DATE, 'yyyyMMdd') AS SIGN_DATE ,SIGN_RMK ,DEPT_NM ,POSITION_NM ,DUTY_NM FROM STOCSCTP WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND APP_DOC_NUM = #{APP_DOC_NUM} AND APP_DOC_CNT = #{APP_DOC_CNT} AND DEL_FLAG = '0' ORDER BY SIGN_PATH_SQ

SELECT SIGN_PATH_SQ ,(CASE WHEN SIGN_REQ_TYPE = 'CC' THEN '-' ELSE SIGN_STATUS END) AS SIGN_STATUS ,SIGN_REQ_TYPE ,SIGN_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(#{ses.gateCd}, SIGN_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS USER_NM ,(SIGN_DATE, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi') AS SIGN_TIME ,SIGN_RMK ,DEPT_CD ,DEPT_NM ,POSITION_NM ,DUTY_NM ,BUYER_CD FROM STOCSCTP WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND APP_DOC_NUM = #{APP_DOC_NUM} AND APP_DOC_CNT = #{APP_DOC_CNT} AND DEL_FLAG = '0' ORDER BY SIGN_PATH_SQ

SELECT SCTM.BUYER_CD ,SCTM.APP_DOC_NUM ,SCTM.APP_DOC_CNT ,SCTM.SUBJECT ,SCTM.SIGN_STATUS ,(CASE WHEN SCTP.SIGN_REQ_TYPE = 'CC' THEN '참조' ELSE SCTP.SIGN_STATUS END) AS PER_SIGN_STATUS ,SCTM.IMPORTANCE_STATUS ,SCTM.DOC_TYPE ,((SELECT MAX(SIGN_DATE) FROM STOCSCTP WHERE GATE_CD = SCTM.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = SCTM.BUYER_CD AND APP_DOC_NUM = SCTM.APP_DOC_NUM AND APP_DOC_CNT = SCTM.APP_DOC_CNT AND DEL_FLAG = '0' AND (SIGN_STATUS = 'E' OR SIGN_STATUS = 'R')), 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi') AS SIGN_DATE ,(SCTM.REG_DATE, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi') AS RFA_DATE_TIME ,SCTM.REG_USER_ID AS REG_USER_ID ,getUserName(SCTM.GATE_CD, SCTM.REG_USER_ID , #{ses.langCd}) AS REG_USER_NM ,'' as DOC_CONTENTS ,SCTP.SIGN_PATH_SQ ,SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM, getFileCount(SCTM.GATE_CD, SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM) AS ATT_FILE_CNT ,SCTM.NEXT_SIGN_USER_ID ,(CASE WHEN SCTM.SIGN_STATUS = 'P' THEN CUR.USER_NM ELSE '-' END) AS NEXT_SIGN_USER_NM ,SCTP.SIGN_REQ_TYPE ,SCTP.DOC_SQ ,SCTP.SIGN_USER_ID ,SCTP.DEPT_CD ,(GETDEPTNAME(SCTM.GATE_CD, SCTM.BUYER_CD, SCTM.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}), GETDEPTNAME(CUR.GATE_CD, CUR.COMPANY_CD, CUR.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd})) AS REG_DEPT_NM ,SCTM.APP_AMT
,(CASE WHEN SCTP.SIGN_REQ_TYPE IN ('E', 'ES', 'EP') THEN SCTP.SIGN_PATH_SQ '/' (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCSCTP SCTP WHERE SCTP.GATE_CD = SCTM.GATE_CD AND SCTP.BUYER_CD = SCTM.BUYER_CD AND SCTP.APP_DOC_NUM = SCTM.APP_DOC_NUM AND SCTP.APP_DOC_CNT = SCTM.APP_DOC_CNT AND SCTP.SIGN_REQ_TYPE IN ('E', 'ES', 'EP') AND SCTP.DEL_FLAG = '0') ELSE (SELECT TO_CHAR(COUNT(*)) FROM STOCSCTP SCTP WHERE SCTP.GATE_CD = SCTM.GATE_CD AND SCTP.BUYER_CD = SCTM.BUYER_CD AND SCTP.APP_DOC_NUM = SCTM.APP_DOC_NUM AND SCTP.APP_DOC_CNT = SCTM.APP_DOC_CNT AND SCTP.SIGN_REQ_TYPE IN ('E', 'ES', 'EP') AND SCTP.DEL_FLAG = '0') END) AS VIEW_CNT
,(SELECT CONVERT(varchar(10), CONVERT(INT, (MAX(SIGN_PATH_SQ), 0))) FROM STOCSCTP SCTP WHERE SCTP.GATE_CD = SCTM.GATE_CD AND SCTP.BUYER_CD = SCTM.BUYER_CD AND SCTP.APP_DOC_NUM = SCTM.APP_DOC_NUM AND SCTP.APP_DOC_CNT = SCTM.APP_DOC_CNT AND SCTP.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND SCTP.SIGN_STATUS IN ('E', 'R')) '/' (SELECT CONVERT(varchar(10), CONVERT(INT, COUNT(*))) FROM STOCSCTP SCTP WHERE SCTP.GATE_CD = SCTM.GATE_CD AND SCTP.BUYER_CD = SCTM.BUYER_CD AND SCTP.APP_DOC_NUM = SCTM.APP_DOC_NUM AND SCTP.APP_DOC_CNT = SCTM.APP_DOC_CNT AND SCTP.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND SCTP.SIGN_REQ_TYPE = 'E') AS VIEW_CNT
FROM STOCSCTM SCTM INNER JOIN STOCSCTP SCTP ON (SCTM.GATE_CD = SCTP.GATE_CD AND SCTM.BUYER_CD = SCTP.BUYER_CD AND SCTM.APP_DOC_NUM = SCTP.APP_DOC_NUM AND SCTM.APP_DOC_CNT = SCTP.APP_DOC_CNT) LEFT OUTER JOIN STOCCVUR CUR ON (SCTM.GATE_CD = CUR.GATE_CD AND SCTM.NEXT_SIGN_USER_ID = CUR.USER_ID) WHERE SCTM.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND SCTM.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND SCTP.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND ((SCTP.SIGN_STATUS IN ('E','R') AND SCTP.SIGN_REQ_TYPE IN ('E', 'ES', 'EP', 'A')) OR (SCTM.SIGN_STATUS = 'E' AND SCTP.SIGN_REQ_TYPE = 'CC')) AND SCTM.SIGN_STATUS IN ('P','E','R') AND ((SCTP.SIGN_USER_ID = #{ses.userId}) OR (SCTP.DEPT_NM = #{ses.deptNm})) AND SCTP.DOC_SQ = '1'
AND SCTM.REG_DATE >= (#{RFA_FROM_DATE}) AND SCTM.REG_DATE <= (#{RFA_TO_DATE})
AND SCTM.SIGN_STATUS = #{SIGN_STATUS}
AND SCTM.DOC_TYPE = #{DOCUMENT_TYPE}
AND UPPER(SCTM.REG_USER_ID) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{USER_ID}) '%'
AND UPPER(getUserName(SCTM.GATE_CD, SCTM.REG_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{USER_NM}) '%'
AND UPPER(REPLACE(SCTM.SUBJECT, ' ', '')) LIKE '%' UPPER(REPLACE(#{DOCUMENT_NM}, ' ', '')) '%'
ORDER BY SCTM.REG_DATE DESC

SELECT SCTM.APP_DOC_NUM ,SCTM.APP_DOC_CNT ,SCTM.SIGN_STATUS ,SCTM.IMPORTANCE_STATUS ,SCTM.DOC_TYPE ,SCTM.SUBJECT ,(SCTM.REG_DATE, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi') AS RFA_DATE_TIME ,'' AS DOC_CONTENTS ,(SELECT MIN(SIGN_PATH_SQ) FROM STOCSCTP WHERE GATE_CD = SCTM.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = SCTM.BUYER_CD AND APP_DOC_NUM = SCTM.APP_DOC_NUM AND APP_DOC_CNT = SCTM.APP_DOC_CNT AND SIGN_USER_ID = NEXT_SIGN_USER_ID AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS SIGN_PATH_SQ ,((SELECT MAX(SIGN_DATE) FROM STOCSCTP WHERE GATE_CD = SCTM.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = SCTM.BUYER_CD AND APP_DOC_NUM = SCTM.APP_DOC_NUM AND APP_DOC_CNT = SCTM.APP_DOC_CNT AND DEL_FLAG = '0' AND (SIGN_STATUS = 'E' OR SIGN_STATUS = 'R')), 'yyyy-MM-dd hh24:mi') AS SIGN_DATE ,SCTM.ATT_FILE_NUM ,SCTM.APP_AMT ,SCTM.BUYER_CD
,(SELECT COUNT(TP.SIGN_PATH_SQ) FROM STOCSCTP TP WHERE TP.GATE_CD = SCTM.GATE_CD AND TP.BUYER_CD = SCTM.BUYER_CD AND TP.APP_DOC_NUM = SCTM.APP_DOC_NUM AND TP.APP_DOC_CNT = SCTM.APP_DOC_CNT AND TP.SIGN_STATUS IN ('E','R') AND TP.DEL_FLAG = '0' ) '/' (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCSCTP TP WHERE TP.GATE_CD = SCTM.GATE_CD AND TP.BUYER_CD = SCTM.BUYER_CD AND TP.APP_DOC_NUM = SCTM.APP_DOC_NUM AND TP.APP_DOC_CNT = SCTM.APP_DOC_CNT AND TP.SIGN_REQ_TYPE IN ('E', 'ES', 'EP', 'A') AND TP.DEL_FLAG = '0') AS VIEW_CNT
,(SELECT CONVERT(varchar(10), CONVERT(INT, (MAX(SIGN_PATH_SQ), 0))) FROM STOCSCTP SCTP WHERE SCTP.GATE_CD = SCTM.GATE_CD AND SCTP.BUYER_CD = SCTM.BUYER_CD AND SCTP.APP_DOC_NUM = SCTM.APP_DOC_NUM AND SCTP.APP_DOC_CNT = SCTM.APP_DOC_CNT AND SCTP.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND SCTP.SIGN_STATUS in ('E', 'R')) '/' (SELECT CONVERT(varchar(10), CONVERT(INT, COUNT(*))) FROM STOCSCTP SCTP WHERE SCTP.GATE_CD = SCTM.GATE_CD AND SCTP.BUYER_CD = SCTM.BUYER_CD AND SCTP.APP_DOC_NUM = SCTM.APP_DOC_NUM AND SCTP.APP_DOC_CNT = SCTM.APP_DOC_CNT AND SCTP.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND SCTP.SIGN_REQ_TYPE = 'E') AS VIEW_CNT
FROM STOCSCTM SCTM WHERE SCTM.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND SCTM.REG_USER_ID = #{ses.userId} AND SCTM.DEL_FLAG = '0'
AND SCTM.REG_DATE >= (#{START_DATE}) AND SCTM.REG_DATE <= (#{END_DATE})
AND SCTM.SIGN_STATUS = #{SIGN_STATUS}
AND SCTM.DOC_TYPE = #{DOC_TYPE}
AND UPPER(REPLACE(SCTM.SUBJECT, ' ', '')) LIKE '%' UPPER(REPLACE(#{SUBJECT}, ' ', '')) '%'
ORDER BY SCTM.REG_DATE DESC

SELECT LULP.PATH_SQ ,LULP.SIGN_USER_ID SIGN_USER_ID ,getUserName(LULP.GATE_CD, LULP.SIGN_USER_ID , #{ses.langCd}) AS USER_NM ,CUST.CUST_CD AS BUYER_CD ,CUST.CUST_NM AS BUYER_NM ,getDeptName(LULP.GATE_CD, OGDP.BUYER_CD, OGDP.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS DEPT_NM ,USERTB.POSITION_NM ,USERTB.DUTY_NM ,LULP.SIGN_REQ_STATUS ,LULP.GATE_CD ,LULP.PATH_NUM ,'R' AS INSERT_FLAG FROM STOCLULP LULP JOIN STOCCVUR USERTB ON (LULP.SIGN_USER_ID = USERTB.USER_ID AND LULP.GATE_CD = USERTB.GATE_CD) LEFT OUTER JOIN STOCOGDP OGDP ON (USERTB.GATE_CD = OGDP.GATE_CD AND USERTB.COMPANY_CD = OGDP.BUYER_CD AND USERTB.DEPT_CD = OGDP.DEPT_CD AND OGDP.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCCUST CUST ON (USERTB.GATE_CD = CUST.GATE_CD AND USERTB.COMPANY_CD = CUST.CUST_CD) WHERE LULP.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND LULP.PATH_NUM = #{PATH_NUM} AND LULP.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND USERTB.DEL_FLAG = '0' ORDER BY LULP.PATH_SQ

SELECT
SF_LPAD((MAX(TO_NUMBER(PATH_NUM))+1, 1), 10, '0')
SF_LPAD((MAX(CAST(PATH_NUM AS FLOAT))+1, 1), 10, '0')
FROM STOCRULM WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd}

SELECT RULM.SIGN_PATH_NM ,(SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT PATH_SQ) FROM STOCLULP LULP JOIN STOCCVUR USERTB ON (LULP.GATE_CD = USERTB.GATE_CD AND LULP.SIGN_USER_ID = USERTB.USER_ID) LEFT JOIN STOCOGDP OGDP ON (USERTB.GATE_CD = OGDP.GATE_CD AND USERTB.DEPT_CD = OGDP.DEPT_CD AND OGDP.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE LULP.GATE_CD = RULM.GATE_CD AND LULP.PATH_NUM = RULM.PATH_NUM AND LULP.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND USERTB.DEL_FLAG = '0') PATH_SQ ,(RULM.REG_DATE, 'yyyyMMdd') AS REG_DATE ,RULM.PATH_NUM FROM STOCRULM RULM WHERE RULM.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND PATH_USER_ID = #{ses.userId} AND RULM.DEL_FLAG = '0' ORDER BY RULM.REG_DATE DESC

SELECT A.SIGN_USER_ID, A.SIGN_USER_NM ,A.CUST_CD, A.CUST_NM ,A.DEPT_CD, A.DEPT_NM ,A.POSITION_NM FROM ( SELECT UR.USER_ID AS SIGN_USER_ID, UR.USER_NM AS SIGN_USER_NM, UR.DEPT_CD, DP.DEPT_NM, UR.DUTY_NM AS POSITION_NM, CUST.CUST_CD, CUST.CUST_NM FROM STOCCVUR UR LEFT JOIN STOCOGDP DP ON (UR.DEPT_CD = DP.DEPT_CD AND UR.COMPANY_CD = DP.BUYER_CD AND DP.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND UR.GATE_CD = DP.GATE_CD) LEFT JOIN STOCCUST CUST ON (UR.COMPANY_CD = CUST.CUST_CD AND UR.GATE_CD = CUST.GATE_CD AND CUST.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE UR.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND UR.COMPANY_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND UR.USER_TYPE = 'B' AND UR.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND UR.PROGRESS_CD = 'E'
AND UPPER(DP.DEPT_NM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{DEPT_CD}) '%'
) A WHERE 1 = 1
AND UPPER(A.SIGN_USER_NM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{SIGN_USER_NM}) '%'
ORDER BY A.CUST_NM, A.DEPT_NM, A.POSITION_NM, A.SIGN_USER_NM

SELECT T.* FROM( SELECT 'A' AS SIGN_REQ_TYPE ,LD.REF_USER_ID AS SIGN_USER_ID ,UR.USER_NM AS SIGN_USER_NM ,'' AS SIGN_USER_NM_IMG ,UR.DUTY_NM AS POSITION_NM ,UR.DEPT_CD ,GETDEPTNAME(UR.GATE_CD, UR.COMPANY_CD, UR.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS DEPT_NM ,UR.DUTY_NM
,UR.POSITION_CD ,'' AS POSITION_CD
FROM STOCDMLD LD
LEFT JOIN STOCUSER UR LEFT JOIN STOCCVUR UR
ON (LD.GATE_CD = UR.GATE_CD AND LD.REF_USER_ID = UR.USER_ID AND UR.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE LD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND LD.CUST_CD = #{CUST_CD} AND LD.DML_TYPE = 'AGR' AND LD.REF_CD = #{CODE} -- 합의라인 Code AND LD.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND LD.USE_FLAG = '1'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'CC' AS SIGN_REQ_TYPE ,LD.REF_USER_ID AS SIGN_USER_ID ,UR.USER_NM AS SIGN_USER_NM ,'' AS SIGN_USER_NM_IMG ,UR.DUTY_NM AS POSITION_NM ,UR.DEPT_CD ,GETDEPTNAME(UR.GATE_CD, UR.COMPANY_CD, UR.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS DEPT_NM ,UR.DUTY_NM
,UR.POSITION_CD ,'' AS POSITION_CD
FROM STOCDMLD LD
LEFT JOIN STOCUSER UR LEFT JOIN STOCCVUR UR
ON (LD.GATE_CD = UR.GATE_CD AND LD.REF_USER_ID = UR.USER_ID AND UR.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE LD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND LD.CUST_CD = #{CUST_CD} AND LD.DML_TYPE = 'REF' AND LD.REF_CD = #{REF_CD} -- 전결구분 (대분류) AND LD.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND LD.USE_FLAG = '1'
AND TO_NUMBER(#{REF_BIZ_AMT}) BETWEEN LD.FROM_AMT AND LD.TO_AMT
AND CONVERT(numeric, #{REF_BIZ_AMT}) BETWEEN LD.FROM_AMT AND LD.TO_AMT
) T ORDER BY T.SIGN_REQ_TYPE

SELECT 'E' AS SIGN_REQ_TYPE ,UR.USER_ID AS SIGN_USER_ID ,UR.USER_NM AS SIGN_USER_NM ,'' AS SIGN_USER_NM_IMG ,UR.POSITION_NM ,GETDEPTNAME(UR.GATE_CD, UR.COMPANY_CD, UR.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS DEPT_NM ,UR.DEPT_CD ,UR.DUTY_NM FROM STOCUSER UR INNER JOIN (SELECT A.GATE_CD
,regexp_substr(A.USER_ID, '[^,]+', 1, LEVEL) AS USER_ID ,ROWNUM AS SORT_SQ
,SUBSTRING(Split.a.value('.', 'NVARCHAR(100)'), 1, LEN(Split.a.value('.', 'NVARCHAR(100)'))) AS USER_ID ,SUBSTRING(Split.a.value('.', 'NVARCHAR(100)'), 1, 1) AS SORT_SQ
FROM ( SELECT A.GATE_CD
,A.TEXT1 AS USER_ID
, CAST('<M>' + REPLACE(A.TEXT1, ',', '</M><M>') + '</M>' AS XML) AS USER_ID
FROM STOCCODD A WHERE A.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND A.CODE_TYPE = 'MP030' AND A.CODE = #{CODE} AND A.USE_FLAG = '1' AND A.DEL_FLAG = '0'
) A CONNECT BY LEVEL <= (regexp_replace(A.USER_ID, '[^,]+',''))+1 ) B
) AS A CROSS APPLY USER_ID.nodes ('/M') AS Split(a)) B
ON (UR.GATE_CD = B.GATE_CD AND UR.USER_ID = B.USER_ID) WHERE UR.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND UR.COMPANY_CD = #{CUST_CD} AND UR.DEL_FLAG = '0' ORDER BY B.SORT_SQ

SELECT 'E' AS SIGN_REQ_TYPE ,UR.USER_ID AS SIGN_USER_ID ,UR.USER_NM AS SIGN_USER_NM ,'' AS SIGN_USER_NM_IMG ,UR.DUTY_NM AS POSITION_NM ,GETDEPTNAME(UR.GATE_CD, UR.COMPANY_CD, UR.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS DEPT_NM ,UR.DEPT_CD ,UR.DUTY_NM FROM STOCCVUR UR INNER JOIN (SELECT A.GATE_CD, A.CHIEF_USER_ID AS USER_ID FROM STOCCVUR A WHERE A.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND A.USER_ID = #{REG_USER_ID} AND A.DEL_FLAG = '0') A ON (UR.GATE_CD = A.GATE_CD AND UR.USER_ID = A.USER_ID) WHERE UR.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND UR.COMPANY_CD = #{CUST_CD} AND UR.DEL_FLAG = '0'

SELECT 'E' AS SIGN_REQ_TYPE ,UR.USER_ID AS SIGN_USER_ID ,UR.USER_NM AS SIGN_USER_NM ,'' AS SIGN_USER_NM_IMG ,UR.DUTY_NM AS POSITION_NM ,GETDEPTNAME(UR.GATE_CD, UR.COMPANY_CD, UR.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS DEPT_NM ,UR.DEPT_CD ,UR.DUTY_NM FROM STOCCVUR UR INNER JOIN (SELECT A.GATE_CD
,regexp_substr(A.USER_ID, '[^,]+', 1, LEVEL) AS USER_ID ,ROWNUM AS SORT_SQ
,SUBSTRING(Split.a.value('.', 'NVARCHAR(100)'), 2, LEN(Split.a.value('.', 'NVARCHAR(100)'))) AS USER_ID ,SUBSTRING(Split.a.value('.', 'NVARCHAR(100)'), 1, 1) AS SORT_SQ
FROM ( SELECT A.GATE_CD
,A.TEXT1 AS USER_ID
,CAST ('<M>' + REPLACE(A.TEXT2, ',', '</M><M>') + '</M>' AS XML) AS USER_ID
FROM STOCCODD A WHERE A.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND A.CODE_TYPE = 'MP030' AND A.CODE = #{CODE} AND A.USE_FLAG = '1' AND A.DEL_FLAG = '0'
) A CONNECT BY LEVEL <= (regexp_replace(A.USER_ID, '[^,]+',''))+1) B
) AS A CROSS APPLY USER_ID.nodes ('/M') AS Split(a)) B
ON (UR.GATE_CD = B.GATE_CD AND UR.USER_ID = B.USER_ID) WHERE UR.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND UR.COMPANY_CD = #{CUST_CD} AND UR.DEL_FLAG = '0' ORDER BY B.SORT_SQ

SELECT DISTINCT '' AS DOC_SQ ,LULP.PATH_SQ AS SIGN_PATH_SQ ,LULP.SIGN_USER_ID AS SIGN_USER_ID ,getUserName(LULP.GATE_CD, LULP.SIGN_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS SIGN_USER_NM ,getDeptName(LULP.GATE_CD, OGDP.BUYER_CD, OGDP.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS DEPT_NM ,OGDP.DEPT_CD ,USERTB.POSITION_NM ,USERTB.DUTY_NM ,LULP.SIGN_REQ_STATUS AS SIGN_REQ_TYPE FROM STOCLULP LULP JOIN STOCCVUR USERTB ON (LULP.SIGN_USER_ID = USERTB.USER_ID AND LULP.GATE_CD = USERTB.GATE_CD) LEFT JOIN STOCOGDP OGDP ON (USERTB.GATE_CD = OGDP.GATE_CD AND USERTB.DEPT_CD = OGDP.DEPT_CD AND OGDP.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE LULP.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND LULP.PATH_NUM = #{PATH_NUM} AND LULP.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND USERTB.DEL_FLAG = '0' ORDER BY LULP.PATH_SQ

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCSCTM SCTM LEFT JOIN STOCSCTP SCTP ON (SCTM.GATE_CD = SCTP.GATE_CD AND SCTM.BUYER_CD = SCTP.BUYER_CD AND SCTM.APP_DOC_NUM = SCTP.APP_DOC_NUM AND SCTM.APP_DOC_CNT = SCTP.APP_DOC_CNT) WHERE SCTM.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND SCTM.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND SCTM.APP_DOC_NUM = #{APP_DOC_NUM} AND SCTM.APP_DOC_CNT = #{APP_DOC_CNT} AND (SCTM.REG_USER_ID = #{ses.userId} OR (SCTP.SIGN_STATUS IN ('E', 'R') AND SCTP.SIGN_USER_ID = #{ses.userId}) OR (SCTP.SIGN_REQ_TYPE = 'CC' AND SCTP.SIGN_USER_ID = #{ses.userId}) OR (SCTM.NEXT_SIGN_USER_ID = #{ses.userId})) AND SCTM.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND SCTP.DEL_FLAG = '0'
